title: betonica alopecuros subsp. godronii
intro: Betonica alopecuros subsp. godronii, also known as Stachys godronii, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family, native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Betonica alopecuros subsp. godronii include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and relieve respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. Betonica alopecuros subsp. godronii can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal and health benefits.
